Operation 'addBlockToChannel' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks clarity on what is returned and the side effects of the operation. Enhanced version specifies the response object and clarifies that the block is immediately accessible, helping AI agents understand the operation's full impact.

data.current_summary: Add a block to a channel
data.current_description: Creates a new block and adds it to the specified channel. Either source (URL) or content (text) is required.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new block and adds it to the specified channel. Requires either a source URL or text content. Returns the newly created block object with its assigned ID and metadata. The block becomes immediately accessible within the channel.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks clarity on what is returned and the side effects of the operation. Enhanced version specifies the response object and clarifies that the block is immediately accessible, helping AI agents understand the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'addChannelCollaborators' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague about input format and lacks clarity on side effects. Enhanced version specifies that it accepts user IDs, clarifies the request format, explains what is returned, and describes the access implications for added collaborators, enabling better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Accepts a serialized list of ids. Returns the current list of collaborators.
data.description_suggestion: Adds one or more collaborators to a channel by their user IDs. Accepts a serialized list of user IDs in the request body. Returns the updated list of all channel collaborators. Added users gain access to the channel and can view and interact with its contents.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about input format and lacks clarity on side effects. Enhanced version specifies that it accepts user IDs, clarifies the request format, explains what is returned, and describes the access implications for added collaborators, enabling better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'removeChannelCollaborators' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is repetitive and lacks essential details. Enhanced version specifies input format (user IDs), clarifies what is returned, and explains the side effects (access revocation), providing AI agents with complete operational context for decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Removes one or more collaborators from a channel by their user IDs. Accepts a serialized list of user IDs in the request body. Returns the updated list of remaining collaborators. Removed users lose access to the channel and can no longer view or interact with its contents.
data.reasoning: Current description is repetitive and lacks essential details. Enhanced version specifies input format (user IDs), clarifies what is returned, and explains the side effects (access revocation), providing AI agents with complete operational context for decision-making.

message: Operation 'createChannel' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too minimal. Enhanced version explains required inputs (name, optional description), authentication requirement, return value structure, and side effect (user becomes owner) to help AI agents understand the operation's full context and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new channel with the provided name and optional description. Requires authentication. Returns the newly created channel object with all properties including slug, created timestamp, and initial metadata. The authenticated user becomes the channel owner.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Enhanced version explains required inputs (name, optional description), authentication requirement, return value structure, and side effect (user becomes owner) to help AI agents understand the operation's full context and effects.

message: Operation 'getChannel' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_context. Description mentions pagination but doesn't clarify what parameters control it or what the response structure includes. Enhanced version specifies that slug is the identifier, clarifies pagination is optional, and confirms the response includes full channel details with blocks.

data.current_description: Returns a complete representation of a channel. Channel contents can be paginated.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a complete representation of a channel identified by its slug. Includes all channel metadata and properties. Channel contents (blocks) can be paginated using optional parameters. Returns the full channel object with nested block information.
data.reasoning: Description mentions pagination but doesn't clarify what parameters control it or what the response structure includes. Enhanced version specifies that slug is the identifier, clarifies pagination is optional, and confirms the response includes full channel details with blocks.

message: Operation 'updateChannel' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is identical to summary and provides no useful information. Enhanced version explains what can be updated, authentication/permission requirements, partial update support, and return value to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing channel's properties such as name and description. Requires authentication and appropriate permissions. Accepts partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated channel object with all current properties.
data.reasoning: Current description is identical to summary and provides no useful information. Enhanced version explains what can be updated, authentication/permission requirements, partial update support, and return value to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getChannelThumb' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, unclear_purpose. Original summary uses vague term 'thumbnails' without clarity. Description uses imprecise language ('some fixed basic information'). Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose (thumbnail display), specifies what data is included (metadata + first 9 blocks), explains the use case, and indicates performance optimization intent.

data.current_summary: Get basic channel info for thumbnails
data.current_description: Returns some fixed basic information for constructing a small channel representation. Returns first 9 blocks.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve channel thumbnail data with preview blocks
data.description_suggestion: Returns lightweight channel information optimized for thumbnail display, including basic metadata and the first 9 blocks. Useful for constructing compact channel previews in UI components. Returns a subset of full channel data for performance efficiency.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses vague term 'thumbnails' without clarity. Description uses imprecise language ('some fixed basic information'). Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose (thumbnail display), specifies what data is included (metadata + first 9 blocks), explains the use case, and indicates performance optimization intent.

message: Operation 'getChannelConnections' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, unclear_purpose. Current description is ambiguous about what 'connections' means and how to control which type is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the two possible connection types, indicates parameters control the behavior, and specifies the response format to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Returns all the connections within a channel or all channels connected to blocks.
data.description_suggestion: Returns connection relationships for a channel. Can retrieve either connections between blocks within a specific channel, or all channels connected to blocks within that channel. Use parameters to specify the connection type. Returns a list of connection objects with relationship details.
data.reasoning: Current description is ambiguous about what 'connections' means and how to control which type is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the two possible connection types, indicates parameters control the behavior, and specifies the response format to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.
